# Ben Zimmermann

> Security researcher specializing in identifying critical failures in large-scale systems. Awarded over $27,000 in bug bounties for securing critical infrastructure and the open web.

Ben is a California-based security researcher with a focus on secret scanning, infrastructure security, and vulnerability disclosure. His work has been featured in TechCrunch and NPR.

## Security Research

- [Pump Production Environment File Exposure](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/stuart-lundberg_pump-terms-conditions-activity-7441951300302479360-iJO8): Awarded $2,000. Found a publicly exposed production environment file containing live AWS credentials with access to 57 S3 buckets, Auth0 management API tokens, and database credentials.
- TYPO3 Slack Admin Token Exposure: Awarded $700. Found a leaked Slack token granting admin-level access to the TYPO3 workspace with 9,600+ members, including private channels and full message history.
- Algolia Netlify Token Exposure: Awarded $700. Discovered a leaked Netlify token granting access to Algolia's Enterprise account, 44 sites, and DNS records for yarnpkg.com.
- [Algolia DocSearch Admin Keys](/blog/algolia-docsearch-admin-keys): Resolved. Scraped 15,000 documentation sites and found 39 Algolia admin API keys with full write access to search indexes for projects like Home Assistant and KEDA.
- [Red Hat SSH Key Exposure](https://access.redhat.com/articles/66234): Hall of Fame. Discovered a leaked SSH private key granting write access to eclipse-che/che, the upstream repository for Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces.
- [Home Depot Exposure](https://techcrunch.com/2025/12/12/home-depot-exposed-access-to-internal-systems-for-a-year-says-researcher/): Featured in TechCrunch. A leaked GitHub token granted access to hundreds of private repositories and cloud infrastructure.
- [GitHub Critical Infrastructure](https://github.com/bzzimmy): Awarded $20,000. Discovered a leaked OAuth token granting write access to core repositories.
- [Vue.js Security Hall of Fame](https://github.com/vuejs/core/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Found a leaked Algolia Admin API key with write access to search index.
- [TripAdvisor Data Exposure](https://benzimmermann.dev): Awarded $1,500. Identified exposed employee token allowing access to source code and pipelines.

## Projects

- [awesome-secret-hunting](https://github.com/bzzimmy/awesome-secret-hunting): A curated list of resources for secret hunting and leak detection.

- [How I Found 39 Admin API Keys Powering Algolia DocSearch](https://benzimmermann.dev/blog/algolia-docsearch-admin-keys)
- [How a Leaked GitHub Token Exposed Home Depot's Internal Systems](https://benzimmermann.dev/blog/home-depot-token-exposure)
